title: Add new/trending topic taxonomy for Semantic Reinforcement Memory
description: Add explicit topic lifecycle flags: new=short&&!medium&&!long and trending=(short||medium)&&!long. Derive from multi-window/history signals and expose in report output/UI.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implementing lifecycle tiers now: new=short&&!medium&&!long and trending=(short||medium)&&!long. Updating report output and dashboard ordering/labels.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Patched backend block and UI: VectorTopicMemory now derives lifecycle windows from cluster timestamps and emits lifecycle_tier/is_new/is_trending plus short/medium/long flags; dashboard renders lifecycle badge (new/trending). Running tests next.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Completed implementation and validation. Report block now emits lifecycle_tier + is_new/is_trending + has_short_term_memory/has_medium_term_memory/has_long_term_memory per topic, while retaining hot/warm/cold memory_tier for severity. Verified in report output record 73268d17-ca1b-4701-adf6-773b44c9e484.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Code pushed to feature/reinforcement-memory in commit dda649a5. Includes backend lifecycle flags + UI lifecycle badge + tests.
